description_long: This hamburger features a round, lightly browned bun with a scattering of sesame seeds on its top surface. The bun appears soft and slightly glossy, with a visible patty sandwiched between the halves. To the side of the hamburger, there are two large, irregularly shaped pieces resembling fried chicken or battered food, adding a contrasting texture and color. The patty is only partially visible, with no clear evidence of additional toppings such as lettuce, tomato, or cheese. The entire arrangement sits on a white, round plate, and there is no visible packaging or wrapper present.
description: A sesame seed hamburger bun with a partially visible patty, accompanied by two large, fried side items on a white plate.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from above, showing the sesame seed bun and the two large, fried side items next to it.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the side of the bun and the fried items, with the patty slightly visible beneath the top bun.
description_view_2: A low, side-on view where the bottom of the plate and the underside of the bun are visible, with the fried items partially obscured.
description_view_3: The fried side items are most prominent, with the hamburger bun partially visible behind them.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No visible toppings such as lettuce, tomato, or cheese are present; the patty is sandwiched between the bun halves, and two large fried items are placed adjacent to the burger.
